license_constraint: SPEC CPU 2017 is paid commercial software. The repository never holds SPEC sources, binaries, or license keys. The harness either reads SPEC artifacts from $SPEC_DIR at runtime or ingests an archived target runcpu report, and only records numeric scores plus hashes/configuration metadata.

compiler_target.blocked_until_built: resolved when build/llvm-stage2/bin/clang exists; remaining blockers are a licensed SPEC_DIR install and an implemented target runner for prototype, silicon, or phone

fail_closed_until: SPEC_DIR env var set and pointing at a licensed install for local execution, or E1_SPEC_RAW_OUTPUT points at an archived target runcpu report/transcript
version.txt at $SPEC_DIR matches pinned_version for local execution
SPEC_LICENSE_FILE hash matches SPEC_LICENSE_SHA256 for local execution, or SPEC_LICENSE_SHA256/E1_SPEC_LICENSE_SHA256 records the licensed archived run entitlement hash
DUT prototype, silicon, or phone target with sufficient sample size (>4 hr per workload)
Raw runcpu output and report bundle archived with artifacts.raw_output_sha256
Archived SPEC run manifest records SPEC CPU2017 version, runcpu command, archived config path/hash, reportable=true, and result bundle hash
L5/L6 target metadata captures clocks, memory, power, thermal, process, software, and calibration context
